text.title: Python Integration Testing Patterns
text.summary: pytest fixtures for PostgreSQL (Testcontainers), FastAPI TestClient, auth headers, and async client setup.

rule.statement: Use a session-scoped engine fixture for Testcontainers and a function-scoped transaction-rollback session fixture. Never create a new container per test.
rule.rationale: Container cold start is multi-second. Session-scope amortizes startup cost; function-scope transaction isolation keeps tests independent.

example.note: Session-scoped container + function-scoped rollback is the standard fixture pair. Reuse from conftest.py — do not redefine in test files.

rule.statement: Override the get_db dependency to inject the test db_session. Clear dependency_overrides after the test via yield + app.dependency_overrides.clear().
rule.rationale: Without the override, the TestClient opens a separate session and the test cannot see rows written in the fixture session.

rule.statement: Generate auth tokens from fixtures, not hardcoded strings. Create a per-test token fixture so each test scenario controls its own claims.
rule.rationale: Hardcoded tokens expire, encode wrong roles, or share state across tests.
